requirement_topic.en: GNERC / GSE Grid-Connection Requirements — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: GNERC / GSE并网要求——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: GNERC / GSE併網要求——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數

summary.en: Georgia's grid-connection technical requirements for solar PV inverters are governed by the Georgian National Energy and Water Supply Regulatory Commission (GNERC) and the transmission system operator Georgian State Electrosystem (GSE). Distribution is operated by Telasi (Tbilisi) and Energo-Pro Georgia (regions). Georgia's grid operates at 50 Hz, single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V — a CIS-legacy parameter set shared with China. Under Georgia's Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA) agreement with the EU, Georgia is progressively aligning technical regulations with EU/IEC standards. Key grid-connection requirements for PV inverters include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within the required window; (2) IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface) compliance for grid-interface parameters; (3) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission limits; (4) firmware and protection relay settings validated against Georgia's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid parameters. Grid-connection applicants must submit technical documentation to GSE or the relevant distribution operator (Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia) and obtain GNERC-regulated connection approval.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚太阳能光伏逆变器并网技术要求由格鲁吉亚国家能源和供水监管委员会（GNERC）及输电系统运营商格鲁吉亚国家电力系统（GSE）管理。配电由Telasi（第比利斯）和Energo-Pro Georgia（其他地区）运营。格鲁吉亚电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相220 V、三相380 V——与中国相同的苏联遗留参数集。根据格鲁吉亚与欧盟签订的《深入和全面自由贸易协定》（DCFTA），格鲁吉亚正逐步将技术法规与欧盟/IEC标准对接。光伏逆变器并网的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据——逆变器须在规定时间内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系统——公用电网接口特性）电网接口参数合规；（3）IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放限值；（4）针对格鲁吉亚220/380 V、50 Hz电网参数验证的固件和保护继电器整定。并网申请方须向GSE或相关配电运营商（Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia）提交技术文件，并取得GNERC监管的接入审批。
summary.zht: 喬治亞太陽能光伏逆變器併網技術要求由喬治亞國家能源和供水監管委員會（GNERC）及輸電系統運營商喬治亞國家電力系統（GSE）管理。配電由Telasi（第比利斯）和Energo-Pro Georgia（其他地區）運營。喬治亞電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相220 V、三相380 V——與中國相同的蘇聯遺留參數集。根據喬治亞與歐盟簽訂的《深入和全面自由貿易協定》（DCFTA），喬治亞正逐步將技術法規與歐盟/IEC標準對接。光伏逆變器併網的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試證據——逆變器須在規定時間內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系統——公用電網接口特性）電網接口參數合規；（3）IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放限值；（4）針對喬治亞220/380 V、50 Hz電網參數驗證的韌體和保護繼電器整定。併網申請方須向GSE或相關配電運營商（Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia）提交技術文件，並取得GNERC監管的接入審批。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
GNERC — Georgian National Energy and Water Supply Regulatory Commission grid-connection rules
GSE (Georgian State Electrosystem) — transmission grid connection technical conditions
Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia — distribution grid connection technical conditions

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and domestic anti-islanding test results. While Georgia and China share the same nominal grid voltage (220/380 V at 50 Hz), Chinese grid-connection documents based on Chinese grid standards are not automatically accepted by GNERC, GSE, or Georgian distribution operators as grid-connection evidence. Georgia's IEC/EN alignment under DCFTA means that IEC-referenced evidence is the expected basis for conformity assessment — not Chinese GB/T certificates alone. Georgia is NOT an EAEU member; EAC/TR CU certification does not apply.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）、GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）及国内防孤岛测试结果。尽管格鲁吉亚和中国电网标称电压相同（50 Hz 220/380 V），但基于中国电网标准的中国并网文件不被GNERC、GSE或格鲁吉亚配电运营商自动接受为并网证据。格鲁吉亚在DCFTA框架下的IEC/EN对接意味着合格评定的预期依据是IEC参考证据——而非单独的中国GB/T证书。格鲁吉亚不是EAEU成员；EAC/TR CU认证不适用。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）、GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）及國內防孤島測試結果。儘管喬治亞和中國電網標稱電壓相同（50 Hz 220/380 V），但基於中國電網標準的中國併網文件不被GNERC、GSE或喬治亞配電運營商自動接受為併網證據。喬治亞在DCFTA框架下的IEC/EN對接意味著合格評定的預期依據是IEC參考證據——而非單獨的中國GB/T證書。喬治亞不是EAEU成員；EAC/TR CU認證不適用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China nominal grid: 220/380 V at 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Although Georgia and China nominally share the same grid voltage (220/380 V at 50 Hz), Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents are not accepted as Georgia GNERC/GSE grid-connection evidence. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance evidence; (c) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission compliance evidence; (d) GNERC/GSE grid-connection application with technical documentation package complying with applicable Georgian technical conditions. Because Georgia's framework is actively evolving under DCFTA EU alignment, exporters should verify the current version of applicable GNERC technical regulations and GSE/distribution operator connection conditions directly with the Georgian regulator and operators before finalising the compliance package. Do NOT assume the EAC/TR CU route applies — Georgia is not an EAEU member.
gap.zh: 差距：尽管格鲁吉亚和中国名义上采用相同的电网电压（50 Hz 220/380 V），中国GB/T并网文件不被接受为格鲁吉亚GNERC/GSE的并网证据。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727公用电网接口合规证据；（c）IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放合规证据；（d）GNERC/GSE并网申请及符合格鲁吉亚适用技术条件的技术文件包。由于格鲁吉亚框架在DCFTA欧盟对接框架下持续演进，出口商应在最终确定合规包前直接向格鲁吉亚监管机构和运营商核实现行GNERC技术法规及GSE/配电运营商接入条件的最新版本。切勿假定EAC/TR CU路径适用——格鲁吉亚不是EAEU成员。
gap.zht: 差距：儘管喬治亞和中國名義上採用相同的電網電壓（50 Hz 220/380 V），中國GB/T併網文件不被接受為喬治亞GNERC/GSE的併網證據。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727公用電網接口合規證據；（c）IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放合規證據；（d）GNERC/GSE併網申請及符合喬治亞適用技術條件的技術文件包。由於喬治亞框架在DCFTA歐盟對接框架下持續演進，出口商應在最終確定合規包前直接向喬治亞監管機構和運營商核實現行GNERC技術法規及GSE/配電運營商接入條件的最新版本。切勿假定EAC/TR CU路徑適用——喬治亞不是EAEU成員。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under GNERC/GSE rules; anti-islanding and IEC 61727 interface compliance are non-negotiable technical gates for grid-tied PV in Georgia
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Georgia GNERC/GSE grid-connection acceptance; EAC/TR CU route does not apply as Georgia is not an EAEU member

source.publisher: GNERC (Georgian National Energy and Water Supply Regulatory Commission)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgia's grid-connection requirements reference IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and IEC 61000-3-2 under its DCFTA EU/IEC alignment trajectory. Chinese GB/T grid certificates alone do not satisfy GNERC/GSE connection requirements. Prepare IEC-referenced test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and submit a GNERC/GSE grid-connection application with a full technical documentation package. Verify current applicable GNERC technical regulations and GSE/distribution operator conditions directly at gnerc.org and gse.com.ge before finalising the compliance package. Georgia is not an EAEU member — do not apply the EAC/TR CU route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚的并网要求在其DCFTA欧盟/IEC对接轨迹下引用IEC 62116、IEC 61727和IEC 61000-3-2。仅有中国GB/T并网证书不能满足GNERC/GSE接入要求。请准备来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC参考测试证据，并提交包含完整技术文件包的GNERC/GSE并网申请。在最终确定合规包前，请直接在gnerc.org和gse.com.ge核实现行GNERC技术法规及GSE/配电运营商条件。格鲁吉亚不是EAEU成员——请勿采用EAC/TR CU路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞的併網要求在其DCFTA歐盟/IEC對接軌跡下引用IEC 62116、IEC 61727和IEC 61000-3-2。僅有中國GB/T併網證書不能滿足GNERC/GSE接入要求。請準備來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC參考測試證據，並提交包含完整技術文件包的GNERC/GSE併網申請。在最終確定合規包前，請直接在gnerc.org和gse.com.ge核實現行GNERC技術法規及GSE/配電運營商條件。喬治亞不是EAEU成員——請勿採用EAC/TR CU路徑。

requirement_topic.en: GNERC Net-Metering for Small-Scale Distributed PV — Residential and Commercial Grid-Tied Systems
requirement_topic.zh: GNERC小型分布式光伏净计量——住宅及商业并网系统
requirement_topic.zht: GNERC小型分散式光伏淨計量——住宅及商業併網系統

summary.en: GNERC has established net-metering rules for small-scale grid-tied solar PV systems in Georgia, allowing prosumers (primarily residential and small commercial) to export surplus generation to the grid and offset consumption. Systems connected to the distribution network (Telasi in Tbilisi; Energo-Pro Georgia in other regions) must comply with the applicable distribution operator technical connection conditions, which are aligned with GNERC regulatory requirements. PV inverters for net-metered systems must: (a) comply with applicable IEC safety and grid-connection standards (IEC 62109, IEC 62116, IEC 61727) as adopted under GEOSTM/GNERC framework; (b) receive technical approval from the distribution operator before connection; (c) use a bidirectional meter installed or approved by the distribution operator. Georgia's net-metering market is growing rapidly, driven by the country's hydro-dominant grid and national renewable energy targets.
summary.zh: GNERC已为格鲁吉亚小型并网太阳能光伏系统建立净计量规则，允许产销者（主要为住宅和小型商业用户）将多余发电量输送至电网并抵扣用电量。接入配电网的系统（第比利斯由Telasi运营；其他地区由Energo-Pro Georgia运营）须符合相关配电运营商的技术接入条件，这些条件与GNERC监管要求相符。净计量系统的光伏逆变器须：（a）遵守GEOSTM/GNERC框架下采用的适用IEC安全和并网标准（IEC 62109、IEC 62116、IEC 61727）；（b）在接入前取得配电运营商的技术审批；（c）使用由配电运营商安装或认可的双向电表。受水电主导型电网和国家可再生能源目标驱动，格鲁吉亚净计量市场正在快速增长。
summary.zht: GNERC已為喬治亞小型併網太陽能光伏系統建立淨計量規則，允許產銷者（主要為住宅和小型商業用戶）將多餘發電量輸送至電網並抵扣用電量。接入配電網的系統（第比利斯由Telasi運營；其他地區由Energo-Pro Georgia運營）須符合相關配電運營商的技術接入條件，這些條件與GNERC監管要求相符。淨計量系統的光伏逆變器須：（a）遵守GEOSTM/GNERC框架下採用的適用IEC安全和併網標準（IEC 62109、IEC 62116、IEC 61727）；（b）在接入前取得配電運營商的技術審批；（c）使用由配電運營商安裝或認可的雙向電表。受水電主導型電網和國家可再生能源目標驅動，喬治亞淨計量市場正在快速增長。

standards_or_laws: GNERC net-metering regulatory framework for small-scale grid-tied solar PV
Telasi technical connection conditions for distributed generation (Tbilisi distribution)
Energo-Pro Georgia technical connection conditions for distributed generation (regional distribution)
IEC 62116 — anti-islanding test procedure (applicable under GEOSTM/GNERC IEC alignment)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent net-metering programme applicable to Georgia. Distributed solar in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) distributed PV policies and State Grid / Southern Power Grid connection rules, referencing China's domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964-2024). Chinese distributed solar connection documentation is not applicable in Georgia and does not give any presumption of compliance with GNERC net-metering or distribution operator technical conditions. Georgia is not an EAEU member — Russian-market or EAEU-market compliance certificates (EAC/TR CU) do not apply and must not be presented as the compliance route for Georgia.
summary.zh: 中国没有可适用于格鲁吉亚的直接对应净计量计划。中国分布式太阳能受国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策及国家电网/南方电网接入规则管理，引用中国国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。中国分布式太阳能并网文件不适用于格鲁吉亚，不给予GNERC净计量或配电运营商技术条件的任何合规推定。格鲁吉亚不是EAEU成员——俄罗斯市场或EAEU市场合规证书（EAC/TR CU）不适用，不得将其作为格鲁吉亚的合规路径。
summary.zht: 中國沒有可適用於喬治亞的直接對應淨計量計畫。中國分散式太陽能受國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策及國家電網/南方電網接入規則管理，引用中國國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。中國分散式太陽能併網文件不適用於喬治亞，不給予GNERC淨計量或配電運營商技術條件的任何合規推定。喬治亞不是EAEU成員——俄羅斯市場或EAEU市場合規證書（EAC/TR CU）不適用，不得將其作為喬治亞的合規路徑。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Georgia net-metering projects must comply with GNERC regulatory requirements and distribution operator (Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia) technical connection conditions. IEC-aligned safety and grid-connection evidence (IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, IEC 61727) is the expected basis for technical approval. Chinese domestic distributed solar approvals do not transfer to Georgia. Confirm inverter model technical compliance, applicable GNERC net-metering rules, and distribution operator connection conditions directly with Telasi or Energo-Pro Georgia before committing product to net-metered installations in Georgia.
gap.zh: 差距：用于格鲁吉亚净计量项目的中国逆变器须符合GNERC监管要求及配电运营商（Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia）技术接入条件。IEC对接安全和并网证据（IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727）是技术审批的预期依据。中国国内分布式太阳能审批不能转移至格鲁吉亚。在将产品用于格鲁吉亚净计量装置前，请直接向Telasi或Energo-Pro Georgia确认逆变器型号技术合规性、适用GNERC净计量规则及配电运营商接入条件。
gap.zht: 差距：用於喬治亞淨計量項目的中國逆變器須符合GNERC監管要求及配電運營商（Telasi / Energo-Pro Georgia）技術接入條件。IEC對接安全和併網證據（IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727）是技術審批的預期依據。中國國內分散式太陽能審批不能轉移至喬治亞。在將產品用於喬治亞淨計量裝置前，請直接向Telasi或Energo-Pro Georgia確認逆變器型號技術合規性、適用GNERC淨計量規則及配電運營商接入條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all distributed solar grid-connection under GNERC net-metering rules; distribution operator technical approval is a non-negotiable gate before connection
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are granted under China NEA policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Georgia; EAC/TR CU route does not apply

source.publisher: GNERC (Georgian National Energy and Water Supply Regulatory Commission)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GNERC net-metering is a separate project approval gate from any Chinese domestic distributed solar approval. Confirm inverter model IEC compliance evidence (IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, IEC 61727) and distribution operator technical connection conditions with Telasi or Energo-Pro Georgia before project submission. Verify current GNERC net-metering rules and applicable technical conditions directly at gnerc.org. Georgia is not an EAEU member — do not apply the EAC/TR CU certification route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GNERC净计量是独立于任何中国国内分布式太阳能审批的项目审批门槛。在项目提交前，请向Telasi或Energo-Pro Georgia确认逆变器型号IEC合规证据（IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727）及配电运营商技术接入条件。请直接在gnerc.org核实现行GNERC净计量规则及适用技术条件。格鲁吉亚不是EAEU成员——请勿采用EAC/TR CU认证路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GNERC淨計量是獨立於任何中國國內分散式太陽能審批的項目審批門檻。在項目提交前，請向Telasi或Energo-Pro Georgia確認逆變器型號IEC合規證據（IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727）及配電運營商技術接入條件。請直接在gnerc.org核實現行GNERC淨計量規則及適用技術條件。喬治亞不是EAEU成員——請勿採用EAC/TR CU認證路徑。
